backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no methods defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the full-screen iframe implementation (using fixed positioning, 100vw/100dvh, and overlay branded bar) is implemented in App.tsx and index.css with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of the three main frontend files describing their roles in the full-screen gallery iframe app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS with light/dark OKLCH color variable definitions for a default shadcn-style theme, without full-screen reset styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Revelation Walls Gallery app with full viewport-fit=cover meta tags, Apple mobile web app settings, and favicon links.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering a full-screen fixed iframe embedding the Revelation Walls gallery, with a fixed overlay branded bar at the bottom and a slide-up credits panel toggled by an info button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with a dark gallery theme using warm gold OKLCH variables, and a critical full-screen reset setting html/body/#root to 100% height with overflow hidden and no margin/padding.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom border radius, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 5) for a Revelation Walls gallery app that embeds an iframe, documenting features, known issues (mobile full-screen layout), architectural notes, and fix requests.
